site.name: Wing Yee AI Lab
site.tagline: Bringing practical AI into everyday healthcare.

thinking.title: Observe
thinking.body: Identify real ward workflow pain points.

thinking.title: Understand
thinking.body: Map patient, clinician and operational needs.

thinking.title: Design
thinking.body: Translate needs into AI-powered product modules.

thinking.title: Build
thinking.body: Prototype usable tools, workflows and demos.

thinking.title: Improve
thinking.body: Iterate through feedback and real-world context.

modules.title: Care Experience
modules.description: Creating better healthcare experiences through immersive technologies, communication and education.

projects.name: Projection Mapping
projects.problem: Patient education and presentations can feel flat or difficult to remember.
projects.solution: Immersive visual storytelling for education, relaxation and clinical communication.

projects.name: AI Music & Video
projects.problem: Healthcare communication often needs a calmer emotional layer.
projects.solution: AI-generated sound for patient engagement, education and ambience.

projects.name: AI Video Concept
projects.problem: Complex health messages need clearer visual explanation.
projects.solution: AI-assisted video concepts for storytelling and patient-facing education.

projects.name: Interactive Education
projects.problem: Patients and visitors need simple, visual ways to understand information.
projects.solution: Interactive product experiences for healthcare communication.

projects.name: Future Yoga Room Experience
projects.problem: Care environments need calmer digital experiences that support wellbeing.
projects.solution: A future immersive relaxation module for patient comfort.

modules.title: Clinical Operations
modules.description: Reducing repetitive work through practical AI systems, automation and workflow design.

projects.name: Roster Automation
projects.problem: Roster planning is time-consuming and difficult to balance fairly.
projects.solution: AI-assisted roster generation for fairness, usability and planning efficiency.

projects.name: Smart Reception
projects.problem: Visitor and bell inquiries interrupt clinical staff before needs are understood.
projects.solution: A tablet-based inquiry layer that identifies needs before interrupting staff.

projects.name: AI Feedback Assistant
projects.problem: Feedback handling can be repetitive, slow and inconsistent.
projects.solution: AI classifies sentiment, drafts replies and keeps human approval before sending.

projects.name: Future Nursing Assistant
projects.problem: Nursing teams need practical support for repeated information and coordination tasks.
projects.solution: A future assistant for ward workflow support and task coordination.

modules.title: Healthcare Intelligence
modules.description: Turning healthcare information into actionable intelligence, briefings and decision support.

projects.name: Hermes AI Agent
projects.problem: AI developments move too quickly to follow manually.
projects.solution: A daily AI intelligence pipeline that summarizes fast-changing updates.

projects.name: n8n Workflow
projects.problem: Administrative and communication processes often repeat across teams.
projects.solution: Backend automation that connects routine signals to repeatable actions.

projects.name: Multi-Agent Healthcare Workflow
projects.problem: Clinical, operational and educational tasks often need coordinated support.
projects.solution: A future multi-agent layer for connected healthcare workflows.

projects.name: Future MCP Integration
projects.problem: Healthcare tools need safer ways to connect context, systems and agents.
projects.solution: Exploring MCP-enabled architecture for connected AI healthcare tools.
